name: /standards-remove: removes the matching entry from .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id my-source && ! grep "id: my-source" .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf "- id: my-source
  name: My
  url: https://my.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
" > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
